message:
fix(main,sdk,session,tools): add providers, recover poisoned mutex, refactor session sync, and loosen hashline regex

Providers (main.rs):
- Add Cohere, Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral to ProviderChoice enum
- Relax --api-key validation: when extensions are present with scoped
  patterns, no longer require --provider/--model flags

SDK mutex recovery (sdk.rs):
- Replace .expect("EventListeners lock poisoned") with
  .unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) in subscribe, unsubscribe,
  and dispatch — recovers from poisoned mutex instead of panicking

Session refactor (session.rs):
- Refactor match { Some => ..., None if ... => ... } patterns into
  if-let-else style for model and thinking-level header sync
- Refactor materialize_branch_fallbacks to compute boolean conditions
  up front, avoiding clippy useless_let_if_seq lint

Tools hashline regex (tools.rs):
- Loosen hashline-prefix regex to tolerate optional whitespace, leading
  > + - characters (diff/quote markers), and spaces around # and :
- 3 new test cases for diff-context and quoted hashline formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
